hypothesis: If neural network Bayesian Algorithm Execution is applied to nudged elastic band calculations by iteratively fine-tuning a pre-trained equivariant neural network potential on adaptively acquired points along the minimum energy path, then it will converge to accurate transition pathways using significantly fewer energy and force evaluations from the true simulator compared to classical NEB, because the surrogate model learns to approximate the potential energy surface in the relevant configuration space while BAX strategically targets the most informative configurations for acquisition.
